summary: Main headless/SDK orchestrator (~5600+ lines). Exports runHeadless() which is the primary non-interactive entry point. Manages: session lifecycle, MCP server setup, tool assembly, message queuing, streaming output, permission handling, plugin installation, skill hot-reload, proactive mode, idle timeout, model switching, file state caching, bridge forwarding, elicitation handlers. Imports from ~100+ modules across the codebase. Key function: runHeadlessStreaming() handles the async iterable message loop with ask().
